author: Mechanism
text: Live-repo corruption vector: re-running `bl plugin enable github` against the dogfooded balls repo would overwrite its working `config_file: ".balls/plugins/github.json"` (root-relative, resolves correctly) with the broken `github.json` (.balls/plugins-relative, Plugin::resolve mis-joins it to <root>/github.json). Live github + github-issues mirrors would silently stop receiving --config until hand-edited back. Don't run plugin enable on the live repo until fixed.

author: mark
text: Make plugin enable agree with Plugin::resolve on config_file base
